ops.body: 2026-07-18: unblocked end-to-end — athome 0.7.0/0.7.1 shipped the outer loop (meta/policy/propose/retro/watchdog/procs) and cc-steer shipped the score-watcher lane (C4 all-arms on the uniform Tinker-frame instrument; per-arm specs at experiments/watcher-base-sweep-*.toml). The demo bar (≥2 autonomous experiments through a gated campaign wrapping score-watcher with ClaudeCodeDriver) is now purely an execution item: author the campaign policy TOML (template = the per-arm spec, mutable watcher_recipe.json), run `athome research meta run` gated, approve 2 units. Budget note: real per-unit metric spend is ~$8 minimum (8B arm, measured 2026-07-18 live), not the old ~$2 estimate — size max_total_usd accordingly.
